'''kanudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thakurain|thakurain]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thakurain|thakurain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kanudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kænidith|kænidith]] || [[word:kænidij|kænidij]] || [[word:kænidish|kænidish]] || [[word:kænidi|kænidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kanunuduth|kanunuduth]] || [[word:kanunuduj|kanunuduj]] || [[word:kanunudush|kanunudush]] || [[word:kanunudu|kanunudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kanuduth|kanuduth]] || [[word:kanuduj|kanuduj]] || [[word:kanudush|kanudush]] || [[word:kanudu|kanudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanufduth|kanufduth]] || [[word:kanufduj|kanufduj]] || [[word:kanufdush|kanufdush]] || [[word:kanufduf|kanufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kanuduthu|kanuduthu]] || [[word:kanuduju|kanuduju]] || [[word:kanudushu|kanudushu]] || [[word:kanuduku|kanuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kanuduth|kanuduth]] || [[word:kanuduj|kanuduj]] || [[word:kanudush|kanudush]] || [[word:kanudu|kanudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kanuduthul|kanuduthul]] || [[word:kanudujul|kanudujul]] || [[word:kanudushul|kanudushul]] || [[word:kanudukul|kanudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kanuduthuthu|kanuduthuthu]] || [[word:kanudujuju|kanudujuju]] || [[word:kanudushushu|kanudushushu]] || [[word:kanuduku|kanuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kanuduthun|kanuduthun]] || [[word:kanudujun|kanudujun]] || [[word:kanudushun|kanudushun]] || [[word:kanudukun|kanudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kanuduthuoro|kanuduthuoro]] || [[word:kanudujuoro|kanudujuoro]] || [[word:kanudushuoro|kanudushuoro]] || [[word:kanudukuoro|kanudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
